verses.text: Miriam and Aaron speak against Moses for his wife; Moses is very meek. Envy. Even kin murmur against him.
Miriam and Aaron speak against Moses for his wife; Moses is very meek. Envy. Even kin murmur against him.
Miriam and Aaron speak against Moses for his wife; Moses is very meek. Envy. Even kin murmur against him.
God defends Moses, 'with him will I speak mouth to mouth.' Vindicated. God honours His faithful servant.
God defends Moses, 'with him will I speak mouth to mouth.' Vindicated. God honours His faithful servant.
God defends Moses, 'with him will I speak mouth to mouth.' Vindicated. God honours His faithful servant.
God defends Moses, 'with him will I speak mouth to mouth.' Vindicated. God honours His faithful servant.
God defends Moses, 'with him will I speak mouth to mouth.' Vindicated. God honours His faithful servant.
Miriam becomes leprous, white as snow. Struck. Pride against God's servant is judged.
Miriam becomes leprous, white as snow. Struck. Pride against God's servant is judged.
Aaron confesses their sin and pleads for her. Confession. He owns the folly.
Aaron confesses their sin and pleads for her. Confession. He owns the folly.
Moses cries, 'Heal her now, O God'; she is shut out seven days. Interceded. The wronged prays for the wrongdoer.
Moses cries, 'Heal her now, O God'; she is shut out seven days. Interceded. The wronged prays for the wrongdoer.
The people wait till she returns, then journey on. Restored. Mercy follows the chastening.
The people wait till she returns, then journey on. Restored. Mercy follows the chastening.
